modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.

short_description_text: Unable to set alt text in Grackle Docs.

full_description_text:  
- The user is trying to set alt text in Grackle Docs.  
- They are unsure of the correct process to do this.  
- This issue may affect accessibility features in their documents.
